title: Jejunum and ileum
body_html:
Jejunum & Ileum Key Points
  • Intraperitoneal
  • jejunum and ileum each approximately 3m long
  • jejunum and ileum continuous with one another

Blood Supply
  • Arterial supply: superior mesenteric artery
  • Venous drainage: via jejunal veins to the superior mesenteric vein

Innervation
  • Pain fibres from T9/10 and pain referred to T9/10 dermatome (level of umbilicus) as a result
  • Parasympathetic supply from mesenteric plexus

Image sourced from Wikipedia
1
1
